title: Sexual/Love Addiction Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Sexual/Love Addiction Support Groups 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIVING HOPE CHURCH LIVING FREE MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Christian faith-based support groups and classes for individuals experiencing addiction to alcohol, drugs, food, or pornography, as well as for those dealing with anger, depression, grief, and divorce. Offers Beyond the Walls, a class for families with loved ones who are incarcerated. Child care is available for support groups and classes. Also provides a community meal. Worship services are offered but are not required for participation. 2711 NE Andresen Road Vancouver, WA 98661 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Community meal: Tuesday 5:30pm -Support groups: 7:20pm, support group times vary -Worship service: Tuesday 6:30pm-7:20pm Email (360) 944-3905 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEX AND LOVE ADDICTS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals to 12-step recovery style meetings for people who have a desire to recover from sexual or love-based compulsive or addictive behavior. Meeting formats include face-to-face, telephone, and web-based options. Does not offer telephone counseling and is not a hotline. Eligibility: Individuals experiencing an addictive compulsion to engage in or avoid sex, love, or emotional attachment Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 7am-3pm Meetings: Varies (210) 828-7900 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SMART RECOVERY USA ADDICTION SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups and peer counseling to help individuals gain independence from addiction and addictive behaviors, including substance use disorder, gambling addiction, and sexual addiction. Offers a "no higher power" approach. The program has four aspects: building motivation, coping with urges, problem-solving, and developing a balanced lifestyle. 7304 Mentor Avenue Suite F Mentor, OH 44060 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by meeting Email (440) 951-5357 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
